# Agent Template - Frontend

React frontend with MUI, TypeScript, and auto-generated API types.

## Development

```bash
# From repo root — copy .env.example → .env first (see root README)
npm install
npm run dev

# Regenerate API types after backend changes (from repo root)
npm run generate-swagger

# Typecheck
npm run typecheck

# Build for production
npm run build
```

## API Integration

This app uses **Orval** to auto-generate TypeScript hooks and types from the backend Swagger spec.

**Important:** Never manually edit files in `src/api/` — they are regenerated by `npm run generate-swagger` (repo root script).

## Architecture

The frontend uses vertical slice architecture under `src/applications/`:

| Application | Role | Purpose |
|-------------|------|---------|
| **Super Admin** | SuperAdmin | Project management, runtime configuration, GitHub integration |
| **Workspace** | Authenticated users | Project workspace and activity |

Shared runtime UI (spec apply history, service status) lives under `src/applications/shared/runtime/`.

Common integrations (AI chat, file upload, charts, PDF, rich text, etc.) are documented in `.claude/skills/` at the repo root — use those skills when adding new capabilities.
